meaning: n.年中,学年中期,<口>学年中期考试
examples: Subject to regulatory approval, the deal is expected to be completed by midyear.
Selected as it rocketed to prominence in midyear, driven by growth and popularity of blogs.
Transmeta's low-power chip could appear in Internet appliances as soon as midyear, Ditzel says.
By midyear we will awaken to an ever shrinking supply of equity and a growing economy.
